letter_excerpt: Not legal or medical advice. Draft assistance only. This is a draft for review by a person before filing. Dear Aetna Behavioral Health Utilization Management, I am writing this polite appeal letter regarding the denial of my prior authorization request for inpatient medical detoxification to treat alcohol use disorder. The determination date on the denial letter is May 19, 2026. I am a 49-year-old male and I am very committed to getting better. Your denial letter states that outpatient detoxification is a less cost...
